name: open-superhuman
description: Open Superhuman — Gmail command palette, hotkeys, split inbox & calendar (Chrome MV3 extension).

scripts.test: node tests/hashutil.test.js && node tests/getcontext.test.js && node tests/storage.test.js && node tests/hotkeys.test.js && node tests/key-behavior-sim.test.js
scripts.smoke:install: npm install --save-dev playwright && npx playwright install chromium
